name: 腾讯问卷
examples_zh: 用纯文本帮我创建一份员工满意度腾讯问卷，包含单选、量表和开放题。
把这份腾讯问卷的第 5 题改成多选题，并保留原有选项含义。
为课程反馈问卷设置逻辑：选择"不满意"的用户跳转到原因追问题。
examples_en: Create a Tencent Survey from plain text for employee satisfaction, with single-choice, scale, and open-ended questions.
Update question 5 in this Tencent Survey into a multiple-choice question while preserving the option meanings.
Set survey logic so respondents who choose "Dissatisfied" in the course feedback form jump to a follow-up reason question.
